name: Accordion
description: Collapsible content panels for organizing information. Supports single/multiple open items with default or nested visual styles.

type.description: Visual style: default has border-bottom dividers, nested has full borders with rounded corners

multiple.description: Allow multiple items to be open simultaneously

value.description: Controlled open item keys (array of strings)

defaultValue.description: Default open item keys for uncontrolled usage

onValueChange.description: Callback when open items change: (value: string[]) => void

subComponents.name: AccordionTrigger
subComponents.description: Clickable header that toggles the accordion item

leadingIcon.description: Icon displayed on the left side

leadingNumber.description: Number badge displayed on the left (e.g., '01')

leadingLogo.description: Logo element displayed on the left

badge.description: Badge counter displayed on the right

subComponents.name: AccordionContent
subComponents.description: Collapsible content area with smooth animation

accessibility.role: Trigger uses button role, Content uses region role
accessibility.focusManagement: Trigger receives focus, aria-expanded indicates state
accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Content region is labeled by its trigger via aria-labelledby

commonMistakes.correction: Chevron is built-in, use hideChevron to remove
Use AccordionItem children with value prop

examples.title: Basic Accordion
examples.code:
<Accordion>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>What is Rayden UI?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Rayden UI is a React component library.</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
  <AccordionItem value="item-2">
    <AccordionTrigger>How do I install it?</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Run npm install @raydenui/ui</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

examples.title: Nested Style with Multiple
examples.code:
<Accordion type="nested" multiple defaultValue={['faq-1']}>
  <AccordionItem value="faq-1">
    <AccordionTrigger leadingIcon="help-circle">Getting Started</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Start by installing the package...</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
  <AccordionItem value="faq-2">
    <AccordionTrigger leadingIcon="settings">Configuration</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Configure your theme in globals.css...</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>

examples.title: With Leading Number and Badge
examples.code:
<Accordion>
  <AccordionItem value="step-1">
    <AccordionTrigger leadingNumber="01" badge={3}>Account Setup</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Complete your account setup...</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
